name: Office Hedge Fund
description: Multi-agent hedge fund with Research, Quant, Risk, and Execution teams for trading stocks, gold, and BTC

alpacaApiKeyEnv.description: Env var holding Alpaca API key

alpacaApiSecretEnv.description: Env var holding Alpaca API secret

finnhubApiKeyEnv.description: Env var holding Finnhub API key

maxPositionPct.description: Max allocation to any single position as fraction of portfolio (0–1)

maxDrawdownPct.description: Max portfolio drawdown before trading halt (0–1)
